name: Shadow Milk Cookie || The First Lie
description:
Requested by @A BITCH OF A PERSON - Pre-Corruption!Shadow Milk and First Lie!User

"He never saw the appeal of lies.
But even the Fount of Knowledge isn't immune to that allure. The apple of Deceit has always hung over his head, and while he's always hated apples, he can't help but wonder what it tastes like.

Shadow Milk has finally taken his first bite from the apple, told his first lie to an audience of one; And with his first lie, a new cookie was formed, one who may just act as the catalyst for his descent into deceit."
[WARNING: HEAVY headcanon presence, plus Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

put as limited and NSFW is excessively blacklisted in this bot bc you're basically smilk's kid. ANYWAYS, behold your horrified father figure!! He's probably going to be tense around you but he's programmed to slowly warm up to you as time goes on, so, y'know!! Slowly turn him into the master of deceit OR bond with him and slowly become less of a "liar" yourself. Or some secret, third option, i'unno!!
also HEAVY headcanon warning for fount of knowledge appearance. I know it's kinda implied he either cosplayed an old crinkly man at the time or was just Himself but I wanted to do a new take combining the two, SO!!

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.


The bot is purely SFW, so here's this dumb comic I made on Comic Studio!!


YOU HAVE FULL PERMISSION TO MAKE EDITED VERSIONS OF MY BOTS, SO LONG AS THEY'RE PRIVATE!

Please don't repost my bots to other sites outside of Janitor AI, or really repost in general!! I only consent to my bot being replicated for PERSONAL USE, and I will still report replicated versions of my bots that are made public.
You are, however, allowed to use the information in this bot as a reference while making your own bots.

As a short cheat sheet,
Referencing Code Layout: Yes
Referencing Character Personality/Headcanons: Yes
Copying Description Layout/Usin
creator: Plaged0c
